Sports Scene

Copied

A regular and popular feature of the Olympics are hospitality houses. Many National Olympic Committees take part in this tradition including China, and on Wednesday, China House officially opened to the public. Sports Scene's Greg Laffradi was there to check it out.

title: Olympics: China House officially opens in Paris  - CGTN

description: A regular and popular feature of the Olympics are hospitality houses. Many National Olympic Committees take part in this tradition including China, and on Wednesday, China House officially opened to the public. Sports Scene's Greg Laffradi was there
